title: 24 Extra Large Hair Rollers, Pink Self-Grip Styling Curlers, Professional Salon Quality, (6 Packs x 4 Rollers) 63mm Diameter
features: PROFESSIONAL STYLING: Set of 24 extra large pink self-grip hair rollers perfect for creating voluminous, long-lasting curls and waves
DIMENSIONS: Large 63mm diameter rollers provide maximum volume and are ideal for longer hair styles and loose waves
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Comes in 6 separate packs containing 4 rollers each for easy storage and organisation
SELF-GRIP DESIGN: Velcro-style surface securely holds hair in place without clips or pins for comfortable overnight wear
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for all hair types and lengths, these salon-quality rollers can be used with or without heat styling
description: Product Description Extra Large Rollers County Sales Ltd County Sales was established in 1981 and are a UK based distributor of branded and own label products specialising predominantly in the health & beauty sector. County are a major importer from the Far East & Europe and have developed key relationships with local manufacturers & agents who are able to offer local management of the supply chain. Our local partners manage quality control and logistics, ensuring all orders are shipped and delivered on time. CS Beauty Extra Large Rollers Transform your hair styling routine with these professional-quality extra large hair rollers. Each pack contains 4 pink self-grip rollers with a generous 63mm diameter, perfect for creating voluminous, bouncy curls and waves. The set includes 6 packs, giving you a total of 24 rollers - ideal for a complete styling session. These velcro rollers feature a self-gripping design that securely holds hair in place without clips or pins, making them exceptionally easy to use.
